# PR/FAQ: [Feature / Product Name]

**Author:** [Name]
**Date:** YYYY-MM-DD
**Status:** Draft | In Review | Approved

---

## Press Release

### Headline

[One sentence: who is the customer and what is the benefit?]

### Subheading

[One sentence: what the product does and why it matters.]

### Problem

[1-2 paragraphs describing the customer problem. Use concrete examples.]

### Solution

[1-2 paragraphs describing how the product solves the problem. Focus on customer benefit, not technical details.]

### Quote from Leadership

> "[Why we're excited about this and what it means for customers.]"

### How It Works

[3-5 bullet points describing the customer experience, not the implementation.]

### Customer Quote

> "[A plausible quote from a satisfied customer describing the benefit in their words.]"

### Call to Action

[How customers can get started.]
